name: Chromium
summary: Chromium entry from SciSpace evidence pass. Evidence level: mixed.
description: Essential trace mineral; proposed insulin-signal amplification via chromodulin-related effects, which may influence glucose handling and metabolic homeostasis.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.

claimMap.claim: v10.0: Chromium evidence for diabetes/glucose is mixed; block monetized 'blood sugar' recommendation.
claimMap.notes: v10.0: Chromium evidence for diabetes/glucose is mixed; block monetized 'blood sugar' recommendation.

qualifiers.dose_or_duration: Chromium doses in diabetes trials vary widely, often 200–1000 mcg/day; routine use should be individualized
